content: packages/harness/src/index.ts에서 export되는 모든 public API를 분석해줘. 각 export가 어떤 파일에서 오는지, 어떤 타입인지 (function/class/type/const), 그리고 packages/cea, packages/headless, packages/tui 중 어디서 사용되는지 매핑해줘. 작업 방식은 다음을 따라: (1) index.ts를 source of truth로 사용해 export 목록을 만든다, (2) export source file은 index.ts의 re-export 경로로 판별한다, (3) usages는 각 패키지에서 grep_files로 찾고, 필요할 때만 해당 파일을 read_file 한다, (4) harness의 모든 소스 파일을 전수로 읽지 말고 표를 작성할 수 있을 만큼의 근거가 모이면 바로 답한다.

reasoning_content:
The user wants me to analyze the public API exported from `packages/harness/src/index.ts`. I need to:

1. First read the index.ts to see what's exported
2. Determine where each export comes from (which file)
3. Identify the type (function/class/type/const)
4. Map which packages (cea, headless, tui) use each export

Let me start by reading the index.ts file.

Now I have the list of exports from index.ts. Let me organize this:

1. From "ai" - LanguageModelUsage (type)
2. From "./agent" - createAgent (function)
3. From "./checkpoint-history" - CheckpointHistoryOptions, OverflowRecoveryResult (types), CheckpointHistory (class)
4. From "./commands" - Command, CommandAction, CommandContext, CommandRegistryConfig, CommandResult, SkillCommandResult (types), configureCommandRegistry, createHelpCommand, executeCommand, getCommands, isCommand, isSkillCommandResult, parseCommand, registerCommand, resolveRegisteredCommandName (functions)
5. From "./compaction-orchestrator" - CompactionAppliedDetail, CompactionOrchestratorCallbacks, CompactionPhase, SpeculativeCompactionJob (types), applyReadyCompactionCore, blockAtHardLimitCore, CompactionOrchestrator, discardAllJobsCore (functions/classes)
6. From "./compaction-planner" - calculateAggressiveCompactionSplitIndex, calculateCompactionSplitIndex, calculateDefaultCompactionSplitIndex (functions)
7. From "./compaction-policy" - CompactionPolicyInput (type), getRecommendedMaxOutputTokens, isAtHardContextLimitFromUsage, needsCompactionFromUsage, shouldCompactFromContextOverflow, shouldStartSpeculativeCompaction (functions)
8. From "./compaction-prompts" - BuildSummaryInputOptions, ModelSummarizerOptions (types), buildSummaryInput, createModelSummarizer, DEFAULT_COMPACTION_USER_PROMPT (function/const)
9. From "./compaction-types" - type * (all types)
10. From "./continuation" - ContinuationMessageData (type), createContinuationMessage, getContinuationText (functions)


11. From "./loop" - runAgentLoop (function)
12. From "./message-text" - MessageTextOptions (type), getLastMessageText, getLastUserText, getMessageText (functions)
13. From "./middleware" - MiddlewareConfig (type), buildMiddlewareChain (function)
14. From "./overflow-detection" - isContextOverflowError, isUsageSilentOverflow (functions)
15. From "./paths" - AgentPaths, AgentPathsOptions (types), createAgentPaths (function)
16. From "./session" - SessionManager (class)
17. From "./session-store" - SessionData (type), SessionStore (class)
18. From "./skill-command-prefix" - PROMPTS_COMMAND_PREFIX (const), parsePromptsCommandName, toPromptsCommandName (functions)
19. From "./skills" - SkillInfo, SkillsConfig (types), SkillsEngine (class)
20. From "./todo-continuation" - TodoConfig, TodoItem (types), TodoContinuation (class)
21. From "./token-utils" - estimateTokens, extractMessageText (functions)
22. From "./tool-loop-control" - normalizeFinishReason, shouldContinueManualToolLoop (functions)
23. From "./tool-pruning" - ProgressivePruneResult, PruneResult, PruningConfig (types), progressivePrune, pruneToolOutputs (functions)
24. From "./types" - type * (all types)

Now I need to check which of these are being used in packages/cea, packages/headless, and packages/tui.

reasoning_content:
Now I understand the package names:
- harness: `@ai-sdk-tool/harness`
- cea: `plugsuits` (uses `@ai-sdk-tool/harness`, `@ai-sdk-tool/headless`, `@ai-sdk-tool/tui`)
- headless: `@ai-sdk-tool/headless` (depends on `@ai-sdk-tool/harness`)
- tui: `@ai-sdk-tool/tui` (depends on `@ai-sdk-tool/harness`)

Now let me search for imports from `@ai-sdk-tool/harness` in each package.
